items.title: The Neowsletter - February 2026
items.summary: Mega Crit's February Neowsletter previews Slay the Spire 2's March Early Access launch and reminds players to wrap up pre-release goals.

items.title: The Neowsletter - January 2026
items.summary: January Neowsletter marks Slay the Spire's anniversary and reflects on the series ahead of the sequel.

items.title: Slay the Spire 2 Releases in Early Access on March 5, 2026!
items.summary: Steam confirms Slay the Spire 2 arrives in Early Access on March 5, 2026 and links the official trailer plus wishlist.

items.title: The Neowsletter - July 2025
items.summary: July Neowsletter previews Colorless Cards and provides a short development update from Mega Crit.

items.title: The Neowsletter - October 2025
items.summary: October Neowsletter confirms a delay and gives a development update ahead of Early Access.

items.title: The Neowsletter - August 2025
items.summary: August Neowsletter marks the newsletter's anniversary and shares a development update on the sequel.

items.title: The Neowsletter - November 2025
items.summary: November Neowsletter offers a content sneak peek and introduces a playable character for Slay the Spire 2.

items.title: The Neowsletter - June 2025
items.summary: June Neowsletter shares gameplay notes and development updates.

items.title: The Neowsletter - September 2025
items.summary: September Neowsletter announces an updated Early Access timeline and explains the decision to move the launch window.

items.title: Slay the Spire 2 is out NOW in Early Access!!
items.summary: Launch post announces Slay the Spire 2 is live on Steam Early Access with store link and studio thank-you.

items.summary: Mega Crit published the official release-date trailer for Slay the Spire 2.
